channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Murang'a family seeks answers over man who died hours after encounter with police and suspected goons
item.description: This article narrates the troubling case of a Murang'a man who died only a few hours after he is said to have met police officers and a group of suspected goons in unclear circumstances. The story foc...

item.title: Two mobile phones seized from parcel intended for inmate in Doda jail
item.description: In Jammu and Kashmir’s Doda district, authorities recovered two mobile phones during a routine inspection of a parcel meant for an inmate at Bhaderwah Jail on Friday. The inmate, identified as Irshad ...

item.title: Akari Chargers Clinch Third Consecutive Victory Over Capital1 Solar Spikers
item.description: In the latest round of the Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference, the Akari Chargers maintained their impressive form by securing their third consecutive win, this time at the expens...

item.title: Family dispute ends tragically as man dies in Mandaveli, police seek suspects
item.description: On Saturday evening, a tragic incident occurred in Mandaveli, Chennai, where a 32-year-old man, Nishanth, was beaten to death outside his residence in Bharathi Nagar. Preliminary reports suggest that ...

item.title: Trump Administration's Legal Opinion Claims Authority to Override California Regulations on Offshore Oil Restart Using Defense Production Act Amid Rising Gas Prices
item.description: Amid surging global fuel prices triggered by the ongoing war in Iran, the U.S. Department of Justice issued a 22-page legal opinion asserting that President Trump can invoke the Defense Production Act...

item.title: Nairobi Teacher Celebrates Birthday with Pupils, Shares Cake and Cancels Homework
item.description: Teacher Cillah from Nairobi County celebrated her birthday in a heartwarming and memorable way by including her pupils in the festivities. She brought a beautifully decorated cake to her classroom, wh...

item.title: Oscar Piastri to start fifth in Australian Grand Prix after Melbourne qualifying
item.description: Oscar Piastri is set for a challenging start at the Australian Formula One Grand Prix after qualifying in fifth position. The session was marked by occasional chaos, with George Russell securing pole ...

item.title: ODM Faction Led by James Orengo Rejects March 27 NDC Over Leadership Dispute
item.description: A faction within the ODM party, led by Siaya Governor James Orengo, has stated that they will boycott the National Delegates Convention (NDC) scheduled for 27 March. The notice for the NDC was issued ...

item.title: Police Officers and Civilians Arrested in Taguig Drug Operation
item.description: In Taguig City, authorities conducted a buy-bust operation that led to the arrest of two police officers and three civilians suspected of involvement in illegal drug activities. The operation, carried...

item.title: Thousands protest in London against US and Israeli strikes on Iran following killing of Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: On 7 March 2026, thousands of demonstrators, organised by groups such as Hands Off Iran, Stop the War Coalition, and others including the Campaign for Nuclear Disarmament and Palestine Solidarity Camp...

item.title: US Court Rules Haitian Temporary Protected Status Cannot Be Ended
item.description: A US appeals court has blocked the Trump administration’s attempt to end temporary protected status (TPS) for more than 350,000 Haitians living in the United States. TPS is a humanitarian programme th...

item.title: 5 Coffee Shop Etiquette Tips for a Polite and Smooth Experience
item.description: Although coffee shops are often seen as cozy and casual spaces, etiquette expert Lisa Mirza Grotts emphasizes that they are shared public spaces requiring courtesy and awareness. Grotts points out fiv...

item.title: B.C. to Keep Clocks on Year-Round Daylight Time Starting This Weekend
item.description: This weekend, British Columbia will officially move clocks forward as the province adopts year-round daylight saving time. The change means residents will no longer adjust clocks twice a year, alignin...

item.title: HMS Prince of Wales Placed on Five Days' Notice to Sail Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: One of the Royal Navy's two aircraft carriers, HMS Prince of Wales, has been placed on advanced readiness in Portsmouth, with its crew instructed to prepare for departure within five days, down from t...

item.title: DOLE and ECOP Confirm Private Companies Can Adopt Flexible Work Arrangements
item.description: The Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) and the Employers Confederation of the Philippines (ECOP) clarified that private sector companies can implement flexible work arrangements, as long as the...

item.title: Inside Ibiza's Ultra-Luxury Weekend Party Scene: Spending, Staff and Excesses
item.description: Ibiza has long been a playground for tourists seeking sun, beaches and nightlife, but a new echelon of ultra-wealthy visitors is taking indulgence to unprecedented levels. Domenique Wissink, a 26-year...

item.title: Babu Owino Faces Arrest Warrant Over Post About Interior PS Raymond Omollo
item.description: Embankasi East MP Babu Owino has come out openly claiming that the government is plotting to arrest him over a social media post directed at Interior PS Raymond Omollo. According to Babu, a warrant wa...

item.title: Kilimanjaro Marathon attracts strong local and international support
item.description: The Kilimanjaro Marathon in Moshi, Tanzania, is once again drawing big attention from both local businesses and international athletes. Set for March 22, 2026, the event will feature a 42km full marat...

item.title: Landmark Lawsuit Challenges Social Media Platforms' Addictive Design Features Under Product Liability
item.description: A significant trial in a Los Angeles courtroom is examining whether social media platforms like Instagram and YouTube can be held liable for harms caused by their design, rather than user-generated co...

item.title: Challenges and responsibilities of the sex discrimination commissioner in addressing gender issues
item.description: In this opinion piece, former sex discrimination commissioner and NSW Liberal minister Pru Goward reflects on the challenging nature of the sex discrimination commissioner role. Goward highlights how ...
